title: Buy The Dip: It's Time To Supercharge Your Dividend Snowball
text: Famous investors' quotes about buying the dip are easy to agree with in theory, but investors often don't follow their advice in real market downturns. Buying stocks during market selloffs requires fortitude, but historically, those who held on through the chaos and bought more have seen huge returns. Buying the dip in dividend stocks leads to higher starting dividend income as well as higher future dividend income, especially when reinvesting dividends.

title: AvalonBay Communities (AVB) Q2 FFO & Revenues Beat, View Raised
text: AvalonBay Communities' (AVB) Q2 earnings reflect a year-over-year increase in same-store residential rental revenues. It has also raised its 2023 core FFO per share outlook.
